no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly describes the fix in detail: 'remaining unprocessed lines from the current split must be preserved (e.g., by saving the trailing partial line with pop(), at(-1), or similar array operations)', 'Bundler subprocesses must not use stdout:"inherit" or stderr:"inherit"', and 'must implement early-exit detection (e.g., via Promise.race, monitoring bundler.exited, or AbortController)'. tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All fail-to-pass tests (test_data_loss_pattern_fixed, test_trailing_partial_lines_preserved, test_bundler_no_inherit_pipes, test_early_bundler_exit_detection) are purely text/regex-based inspection of source code. The tests do require meaningful changes.
